content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated the disabled parsimonious policy threshold-met path in src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs: when workflow.parsimonious_bead_creation.enabled=false, handle_propose_new_bead now skips existing-bead list/show discovery before creation and also avoids the post-create read-side fallback lookup by resolving the created bead id directly from br create stdout. The disabled-policy regression now makes read-side lookup unavailable and asserts no br list or created-bead br show is issued while the proposal threshold is still enforced.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected the current propose-new-bead handler, create-id resolution helper, existing disabled-policy regression, and current working tree state.
1. [Completed] Moved threshold-met existing-bead discovery and replay recovery under the enabled parsimonious-policy branch so disabled policy skips list/show ownership lookup before creation.
2. [Completed] Added stdout-only created-bead id resolution for disabled parsimonious policy so post-create fallback discovery cannot invoke br list/show when lookup is disabled.
3. [Completed] Strengthened the disabled-policy threshold-met regression to tolerate read-side lookup failure and assert no br list or created-bead br show occurs.
4. [Completed] Ran targeted propose-new-bead tests and the required cargo test, clippy, fmt, diff whitespace, and nix build gates.
5. [Skipped] Run br lint after backlog edits.

## Validation Evidence

- nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub handle_propose_new_bead_disabled_policy_skips_existing_lookup_but_enforces_threshold -- --nocapture passed.
- nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub propose_new_bead -- --nocapture passed: 56 lib propose-new-bead tests and 6 matching unit tests passed.
- nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub passed: 1339 lib tests, 378 CLI tests, 1 run_attach_tmux test, 1126 unit tests, and doc tests completed successfully with expected ignored tests.
- nix develop -c cargo fmt --check passed.
- nix develop -c cargo clippy -- -D warnings passed.
- nix build passed.
- git diff --check -- src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- Live orchestration state under .ralph-burning/projects/ni86-1/ remains dirty and was left untouched.
- br lint was skipped because no .beads backlog files were edited.
